name: Mediterranean Stew with Squid, Artichokes and Olives
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds cleaned squid, bodies cut into 1/4-inch rings and tentacles left whole
10 cloves garlic, cut into very thin slices
1 teaspoon fresh thyme or 1/2 teaspoon dried thyme
3 cups canned imported tomatoes, coarsely chopped and drained
1/2 cup pitted and halved nicoise olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly rinse and dry the squid rings and tentacles on cloth towels.
2. In a large heavy pot, heat 2 tablespoons olive oil over moderate heat.
3. Cook the onion until translucent.
4. Add the garlic and thyme and cook for 1 minute.
5. Add the squid and cook for 2 minutes.
6. Add the tomatoes and wine and bring the mixture to a simmer.
7. Cover the pot and leave barely at a simmer over low heat for 45 minutes, or transfer the pot, once the liquid has come to a simmer, to a 300 degree oven and bake for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
